label: Asset Pak
blurb: Real Estate, Title & Property Management. Legal liability reduction and cash-flow velocity.

skills.label: Hoa Ccr Violation Matcher
skills.method: Compares inspector photos of houses against the 200-page Covenants, Conditions, and Restrictions document to validate fines.

skills.label: Move Out Deposit Deduction
skills.method: Compares move-in inspection photos with move-out photos, generating a compliant invoice for carpet cleaning to deduct from escrow.

skills.label: Utility Bill Submeter Biller
skills.method: Takes one massive master utility bill, reads the digital sub-meters for 100 apartments, and invoices each tenant individually.

skills.label: Eviction Notice Compliance
skills.method: Checks tenant ledger for days past due, state-specific grace periods, and generates the legally perfect 3-day "Pay or Quit" notice.
trigger_examples: prevents judges from throwing out evictions due to clerical errors

skills.label: Commercial Cam Reconciler
skills.method: Calculates Common Area Maintenance (CAM) charges (snow plowing, lobby cleaning) and bills them back to tenants based on their exact square-footage pro-rata share.
trigger_examples: automates complex commercial real estate billing

skills.label: Property Tax Appeal Compiler
skills.method: Scrapes recent lower-priced neighborhood comps to build an automated appeal package to fight the county tax assessor's valuation.
trigger_examples: saves property owners thousands in annual taxes

skills.label: Escrow Disbursement Calculator
skills.method: Reads the final closing disclosure (CD), calculating exact wire transfer amounts for realtors, tax authorities, and the seller.
trigger_examples: ensures pennies balance on multi-million dollar transactions

skills.label: Rent Roll Digitizer
skills.method: Extracts lease start/end dates, base rents, and tenant names from 50 PDFs to generate a master Excel rent roll for a bank loan.

skills.label: Title Search Defect Scanner
skills.method: OCRs 100 years of county deed records, flagging unreleased mortgages, mechanic's liens, or easement boundary disputes.
trigger_examples: replaces hours of manual title examiner reading
